Hey guys, I'm gonna talk about bulletproof vitality. Although the products are different, the dosing regimens and directions are the same, so we're combining it. How much should you take? Just take one serving in the morning with all your other stuff, okay? When? Okay, you take a serving. When? You take it in the morning. How? Take it with fluid. If you do get an upset tummy or it's a little sensitive, you can have it with breakfast. No problem. Did you ever stop taking this? Absolutely not. This is like the healthiest stuff ever. No need to ever stop taking it. What happens if you skip? Just hop back on. You can double the dose and it won't hurt you, but that's not a requirement at all. So I want to pay special attention to this. The cycling, the starting and stopping is that this should not be cycled and that the non vitamin ingredients in this product do have cumulative benefits. So the longer you take them, the better they work, the stronger the chemical signaling will be to get the health benefits.
